fileContext.overview: Provides a cache for file contexts.

symbols.name: CacheEntry
symbols.purpose: Represents a cache entry that contains a file context and its content hash.
symbols.parameters: contentHash: string; fileContext: FileContext; cachedAt: string;

symbols.name: cacheFileContext
symbols.purpose: Caches a file context in the shared cache.
symbols.behavior: Stores the file context in the cache with its content hash as the key.

symbols.name: getCachedFileContext
symbols.purpose: Retrieves a cached file context from the shared cache.
symbols.behavior: Returns the cached file context if it exists, otherwise returns null.

symbols.name: hasCachedContext
symbols.purpose: Checks if a cached context exists for a given content hash.
symbols.behavior: Returns true if the cached context exists, otherwise returns false.

symbols.name: loadBranchState
symbols.purpose: Loads the branch state for a specific branch.
symbols.behavior: Returns the branch state if it exists, otherwise returns null.

symbols.name: saveBranchState
symbols.purpose: Saves the branch state for the active branch.
symbols.behavior: Stores the branch state in the branch-state.json file.

symbols.name: updateBranchState
symbols.purpose: Updates the branch state after a workflow run.
symbols.behavior: Merges new file hashes and updates the headCommit.
symbols.parameters: branch: string; headCommit: string; fileHashes: Record<string, string>;

symbols.name: removeFromBranchState
symbols.purpose: Removes deleted files from the branch state.
symbols.behavior: Deletes the file hashes of the deleted files.

symbols.name: hasBranchIndex
symbols.purpose: Checks if a branch has been previously indexed.
symbols.behavior: Returns true if the branch has been indexed, otherwise returns false.

symbols.name: batchCacheContexts
symbols.purpose: Batch-caches multiple file contexts into the shared cache and updates the branch state.
symbols.behavior: Stores the file contexts in the cache and updates the branch state.
symbols.parameters: contexts: Array<{ contentHash: string; ctx: FileContext }>; branch: string; headCommit: string;

symbols.name: partitionByCacheHit
symbols.purpose: Partitions a list of files into cached and uncached files.
symbols.behavior: Returns an object with cached and uncached files.
symbols.parameters: files: Array<{ relativePath: string; contentHash: string }>
symbols.returns: { cached: Array<{ relativePath: string; ctx: FileContext }>; uncached: string[] }
